source_policy: Use official manufacturer pages, press kits, configurators, licensed/Creative Commons media, or screenshots captured from official pages. Do not scrape and reuse random copyrighted photos just by giving credit. Every generated topic must preserve source URLs for the eventual YouTube description.

research_pipeline.goal: Before each car video, discover current car news, viral enthusiast topics, configurator updates, pricing changes, or live market/deal angles, then choose the best format dynamically instead of publishing a hardcoded topic.
preferred_source_order: official manufacturer pages or press releases
marketplace/listing pages for deal formats only
avoid: copyrighted images copied from random websites
old topics unless they are newly viral again

discovery_sources.name: Doug DeMuro
discovery_sources.credibility: large automotive review channel; use as trend signal, then verify vehicle facts with official/manufacturer and reputable news sources

format_templates.selection_rule: Use for newly announced cars, unusual specs, controversial design choices, or official model pages with three concrete sourced facts.
format_templates.research_need: Official manufacturer page or press release plus one reputable car-news source.

format_templates.selection_rule: Use for expensive, polarizing, strange, or highly commented vehicles where the question can drive discussion without inventing claims.
format_templates.story_tone: comment-bait but factual, no fake claims
format_templates.research_need: Official pricing/configurator if available; otherwise cite estimated price clearly as estimated.

format_templates.selection_rule: Use only when live listing data, mileage, title status, location, and comparable prices are available and can be dated.
format_templates.hook_template: This {used_vehicle} is cheaper than {comparison_vehicle}, but here's the catch
format_templates.research_need: Live listing data, mileage, title status, comparable market prices, and a disclaimer that prices change.

format_templates.selection_rule: Use for confusing tech, trims, drivetrain changes, pricing updates, or features people misunderstand.
format_templates.research_need: Official specs plus reputable automotive reporting.

format_templates.selection_rule: Use for exotic/luxury brand controversy only when there is real sourced disagreement or a notable design/business decision.
format_templates.story_tone: dramatic but fair, no rage bait without source support
format_templates.research_need: Official model details plus community/review sentiment from reputable sources.

format_templates.selection_rule: Use for visual, specific, under-covered features from official specs, configurators, or credible hands-on reporting.
format_templates.research_need: Official feature description or credible hands-on reporting.
